message:
refactor(bootstrap): remove JSONL bootstrap, Dolt clone only (gt-vemg9q.1)

Remove the entire JSONL-to-Dolt bootstrap path (Bootstrap(), parseJSONLWithErrors,
importIssuesBootstrap, importRoutesBootstrap, importInteractionsBootstrap) and
742 lines of bootstrap tests. Cold-start now requires either a configured
sync.git-remote for dolt clone, or 'bd init --backend=dolt'.

Also delete orphaned sync_divergence_test.go missed in Phase 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
